reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio de bandera en todo Tinogasta y Fiambalá, por lo que hay largas colas casi siempre, ya que las demás no son reconendables. El tema combustible es bastante problemático en la zona.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only branded gas station in all of Tinogasta and Fiambalá, so there are almost always long lines, as the others aren't recommended. Fuel is quite a problem in the area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROd2JEQWp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Deberían tomar 1 o 2 más para atender las bombas, casi siempre se complica cargar por falta de personal

(Translated by Google)
They should take 1 or 2 more to attend to the pumps, it is almost always difficult to load due to lack of personnel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOeDZheldREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy,pero muy, lento la carga de combustible. Aproximadamente 25 minutos por auto. Fila de 5 autos y tardamos más de una hora.

(Translated by Google)
Fueling up was very, very slow. About 25 minutes per car. There was a line of five cars, and it took us over an hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMWVibDFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca vi una ypf que demoren tanto, filas de cuadras en ambos lados de las calles para cargar combustible, deberían agilizar las cargas y los cobros.

(Translated by Google)
I've never seen a YPF station with such long waits; lines stretching for blocks on both sides of the street to fill up. They should speed up the pumping and payment processes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMWVidTZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cumple lo que si casi siempre llena

(Translated by Google)
It does what it almost always does.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMWFpQk1REAE

reviews.comment:
la disposición de los surtidores es pésima. La atención peor. Hice la fila equivocada para cargar Diesel durante más de 20 minutos y nadie se acercó a decirme que ahí no era. Tuve que volver a hacer la fila durante 30 minutos. Los playeros no tienen ganas de trabajar

(Translated by Google)
The layout of the pumps is terrible. The service is even worse. I waited in the wrong line for diesel for over 20 minutes and no one came to tell me I wasn't in the right place. I had to wait in line again for 30 minutes. The attendants clearly don't want to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOOFlEcUF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Indispensable.  Mi aplauso a quienes trabajan fuerte allí.

(Translated by Google)
Essential. My applause to those working hard there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMnFiTm1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malo, tan solo dos operarios por lo tanto se hace largas las colas para cargar

(Translated by Google)
Bad, only two workers so the queues to load are long
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtdXZ1WjlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
*IMPORTANTE* Si bien todo lo que puedas leer en las opiniones sobre las largas esperas es verdad, en la zona es la mejor y para los que vayan a las termas de Fiambalá les conviene mucho cargar nafta en esta YPF ya que allá las gasolineras son genéricas y tienen combustible de mala calidad, así que es una espera necesaria la que harían.

(Translated by Google)
*IMPORTANT* Although everything you read in the reviews about the long waits is true, the area is the best and for those going to the Fiambalá hot springs it is very convenient to fill up with gas at this YPF since the gas stations there are generic and have poor quality fuel, so it would be a necessary wait for them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxbjUzQUtBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un poco lenta la carga. Todas las veces que fui tuve que hacer fila para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
Charging was a bit slow. Every time I went, I had to wait in line to charge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxazg3V0dREAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar, me gustó mucho como adornaron la plaza frente de la iglesia, mucho calor 🥵

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, I really liked how they decorated the square in front of the church, very hot 🥵
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxMXY2R1hBEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Endless lines every day, at any time; plan to wait at least 30 minutes.

(Original)
Filas intermináveis todo dia, a qualquer horário,  programe-se para ficar pelo menos 30 minutos na espera.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxaUplYm1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Deberian poner mas empleados, solo dos chicos trabajando de cada lado y las filas se hacen eternas para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
They should hire more employees; there are only two guys working on each side, and the lines to get gas are endless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxcXUyMl9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
MUY SERIOS LOS EMPLEADOS!!!

(Translated by Google)
The employees are very professional!
